title: lamium garganicum subsp. reniforme
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. reniforme, also known as rounded-leaved lamium or rounded-leaved dead nettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum subsp. reniforme include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
